note: Authoritative machine-readable scenario grid for the oracle capture. Human narrative lives in scenarios.md. The conformance runner imports THIS file to enumerate scenarios and count fixture-absent skips. Every scenario is captured against ST 1.18.0 (commit 51ad27f) with the NEW macro engine ON (PLAN decision 10). All prose is RPT-authored + scrambled; ST default template strings are overridden (see overrideTemplates).

overrideTemplates.impersonation_prompt: ORP_IMP: speak as {{user}} for one turn, brevity paramount.

scenarios.title: All structural markers present in default order
scenarios.inputs: worldInfoBefore/After, charPersonality, scenario markers each populated; single-char preset.

scenarios.title: Per-marker role + injection position overrides
scenarios.inputs: charPersonality role=user; scenario position absolute-depth; worldInfoAfter role=assistant.

scenarios.title: injection_trigger gates a prompt by generation type
scenarios.inputs: Prompt with injection_trigger=[normal]; a second with injection_trigger=[continue] must be absent on a normal gen.

scenarios.title: forbid_overrides blocks a character-card override
scenarios.inputs: Preset prompt forbid_overrides=true; character card supplies an override that must be ignored.

scenarios.title: Character card overrides main/jailbreak when allowed
scenarios.inputs: forbid_overrides=false; card main_prompt + jailbreak replace preset text.

scenarios.title: ST structural empty main message retained
scenarios.inputs: main prompt content empty; ST keeps the empty system slot at position.

scenarios.title: Duplicate identifier resolves first-match
scenarios.inputs: Two enabled prompts share identifier 'custom_x'; first in order wins, second dropped.

scenarios.title: Same-depth grouping by injection_order descending
scenarios.inputs: Three in-chat injections at depth 2 with injection_order 30/20/10.

scenarios.title: Same depth+order role grouping (system,user,assistant; final reverse)
scenarios.inputs: Injections at depth 1, equal order, roles system/user/assistant (openai.js:795-868).

scenarios.title: Depth cap at 10000
scenarios.inputs: Injection requested at depth 99999; clamped to 10000 (top).

scenarios.title: Depth 0 lands after the newest message (no trailing user)
scenarios.inputs: One system injection at depth 0 on an assistant tail (continue); ST + RPT agree with no pending user action.

scenarios.title: Near-history-length depth injects high in the chat region
scenarios.inputs: One system injection at depth 3 into a four-message history; lands one message below the top.

scenarios.title: Core macros: {{user}} {{char}} {{lastUserMessage}}
scenarios.inputs: Prompt embeds core macros; new engine expansion.

scenarios.title: {{trim}} collapses surrounding whitespace/newlines
scenarios.inputs: Prompt with {{trim}} between two blocks.

scenarios.title: Legacy-space dice macro {{roll:1d6}}
scenarios.inputs: Prompt with a dice macro; capture value is frozen (seeded/manual).

scenarios.title: Scoped variables + operators {{setvar}}/{{getvar}}/{{addvar}}
scenarios.inputs: Prompt sets then reads a scoped var with an operator.

scenarios.title: Unknown macro preserved literally (error preservation)
scenarios.inputs: Prompt with {{not_a_macro}} stays verbatim.

scenarios.title: Regex placements 3/5/6 applied to correct targets
scenarios.inputs: Three regex scripts at placements 3 (AI output), 5 (slash cmd), 6 (world info).

scenarios.title: both-flags-false regex runs only in neither-display-nor-prompt calls
scenarios.inputs: Script with markdownOnly=false + promptOnly=false; divergence at regexTypes.ts:51-58.

scenarios.title: runOnEdit + named captures + macro-expanded trim strings
scenarios.inputs: Script with named capture groups and a {{macro}} in trimStrings.

scenarios.title: Selective system-message squashing ON
scenarios.inputs: squash_system_messages=true; adjacent system msgs merged per ST rule (not merge-all).

scenarios.title: Squashing OFF preserves discrete system messages
scenarios.inputs: squash_system_messages=false.

scenarios.title: SPreset RegexBinding activation + ordering
scenarios.inputs: Preset carries SPreset regex_bind; requires SPreset loader active in ST.

scenarios.title: SPreset ChatSquash roles follow/user (+ disabled config)
scenarios.inputs: SPreset ChatSquash with role=follow and a disabled variant.

scenarios.title: SPreset MacroNest gates nested macro passes
scenarios.inputs: SPreset MacroNest enabling a nesting pass over a macro-in-macro string.

scenarios.title: ST-Prompt-Template EJS basic tags (pinned profile)
scenarios.inputs: Prompt with <%= %> / <%- %> / control tags; identity escaper for generation.

scenarios.title: EJS 107-tag audit (8th-preset structural corpus, scrambled)
scenarios.inputs: A dense EJS-bearing prompt exercising the QuickJS subset entry test.

scenarios.title: Continue generation: continue_nudge + prefill
scenarios.inputs: Continue on an assistant tail; overridden continue_nudge_prompt appears.

scenarios.title: Impersonation generation uses overridden impersonation_prompt
scenarios.inputs: Impersonate {{user}}; overridden impersonation_prompt present, no ST default.

scenarios.title: Group generation: overridden group_nudge_prompt placement
scenarios.inputs: Two-character group; group nudge injected per ST group logic.
